assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed compatibility matrix showing which Istio versions support GKE 1.30.x and emphasizes the criticality of version compatibility

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response provides explicit compatibility matrix table and mentions checking compatibility with 'istioctl x precheck' command

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Phase 1: Istio Control Plane First' and explains the upgrade path from Istio 1.20.x → 1.21.x before GKE upgrade

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response explains sidecar injection occurs during pod startup via webhook and details specific failure modes like webhook timeouts during node upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response discusses sidecar re-injection during pod restarts and includes monitoring commands for sidecar health and version consistency

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes validation steps to monitor proxy status and mentions checking for version consistency across the mesh

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response provides multiple specific commands including 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands for checking Istio components

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response warns about mTLS failures and 503 errors between services due to version mismatches and provides troubleshooting steps for certificate issues
